mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (uuid, kb_uuid, kb_item_uuid, embedding, text, metadata_json) VALUES (#{embedding.uuid}, #{embedding.kbUuid}, #{embedding.kbItemUuid}, #{embedding.embedding}, #{embedding.text}, #{embedding.metadataJson})

INSERT INTO ${tableName} (uuid, kb_uuid, kb_item_uuid, embedding, text, metadata_json) VALUES
(#{item.uuid}, #{item.kbUuid}, #{item.kbItemUuid}, #{item.embedding}, #{item.text}, #{item.metadataJson})
